mapper.select: SELECT id, uav_code, model, manufacturer, max_payload, max_altitude, max_flight_time, max_speed, wingspan, weight, status, remark, ai_generated FROM t_uav ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, uav_code, model, manufacturer, max_payload, max_altitude, max_flight_time, max_speed, wingspan, weight, status, remark, ai_generated FROM t_uav WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, uav_code, model, manufacturer, max_payload, max_altitude, max_flight_time, max_speed, wingspan, weight, status, remark, ai_generated FROM t_uav WHERE model LIKE '%' || #{model} || '%' ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT id, uav_code, model, manufacturer, max_payload, max_altitude, max_flight_time, max_speed, wingspan, weight, status, remark, ai_generated FROM t_uav WHERE uav_code LIKE '%' || #{uavCode} || '%' ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_uav (uav_code, model, manufacturer, max_payload, max_altitude, max_flight_time, max_speed, wingspan, weight, status, remark, ai_generated) VALUES (#{uavCode}, #{model}, #{manufacturer}, #{maxPayload}, #{maxAltitude}, #{maxFlightTime}, #{maxSpeed}, #{wingspan}, #{weight}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{aiGenerated})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_uav SET uav_code = #{uavCode}, model = #{model}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, max_payload = #{maxPayload}, max_altitude = #{maxAltitude}, max_flight_time = #{maxFlightTime}, max_speed = #{maxSpeed}, wingspan = #{wingspan}, weight = #{weight}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, ai_generated = #{aiGenerated} WHERE id = #{id}
